findings.evidence: Lines 82-85 define the exponent with unused `_hv`; lines 90-96 prove the cast using `P.characteristicCubeWeight_mono k (Finset.erase_subset v S) x`, and Mathlib has `Finset.erase_subset` unconditionally at `Mathlib/Data/Finset/Erase.lean:89`.
findings.fix: Drop the membership argument from `characteristicLowerFaceExponent`, `characteristicLowerFaceExponent_natCast`, and `characteristicLowerFaceExponent_eq_zero_iff`; keep `v ∈ S` only at later boundary call sites that quantify over actual cube directions.
findings.issue: `characteristicLowerFaceExponent` requires `_hv : v ∈ S` even though the body only uses `S.erase v`, and the supporting cast theorem proves nonnegativity from `Finset.erase_subset v S` without using `hv`.

summary: The upper-face API is at the natural level, but the lower-face exponent carries an unnecessary membership proof that the definition and its facts do not use.
